title: Mir Run State Schema
description: Single execution of a task. A task may have multiple runs (retries). Tracks the 9-state SM transitions per run.

task_id.description: ULID of the parent task (see task_state.schema.json).

status.description: Current state in the SM. 13 enum values total: 8 main flow states (IDLE/DISCOVER/PLAN/NEED_APPROVAL/ACT/VERIFY/REPORT/DONE) + 5 branch states (REPLAN/BLOCKED/CANCELLING/ROLLBACK/INTERRUPTED). 'DONE' is terminal.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of run creation.

last_transition.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent status change.

current_step.description: Optional identifier of the current SM step within the active state.

current_lane.description: Active lane during ACT/VERIFY. claude=control+judgment, codex=execution+verification, shared=both can read.

artifacts.description: Absolute or repo-relative paths of artifacts produced during this run.

tool_events.description: ULIDs of tool_event entries belonging to this run.

approval_id.description: Approval ULID if status == NEED_APPROVAL or was previously gated.

blocked_reason.description: Free-text reason recorded when entering BLOCKED state. Required if status == BLOCKED.

rollback_target.description: Git ref or snapshot id used for rollback. Required if status in [ROLLBACK, INTERRUPTED].
